I'll reward you. It shouldn't be a problem for an Eternal Doll.

There are loads of tales about this waterway, and every single one
Stay away from that boat. Anyone who goes to take a look at it
No one's seen that little boat in a while... Maybe it sank?

I'll drop dead on the spot!
